_comment: Upstream originals the pack can fetch at install time. Do not replace these with ASP-authored summaries. PIN_AT_INSTALL means the installer must resolve a reviewed commit SHA before copying. Licenses and notices must be copied alongside each installed component (see VENDORING.md).

sources.name: andrej-karpathy-skills (karpathy-guidelines)
sources.author: Forrest Chang (forrestchang)
sources.note: Upstream guardrails file. Verify the LICENSE in the repo at the pinned commit before copying.

sources.name: caveman
sources.author: Julius Brussee (JuliusBrussee)
sources.note: Canonical caveman skill. Verify the LICENSE in the repo at the pinned commit before copying.

sources.name: impeccable
sources.author: Paul Bakaus (pbakaus)
sources.note: Frontend/UI design workflow skill. Prefer the upstream plugin install when the host supports plugins; otherwise copy the upstream skill folder as-is with Apache-2.0 license/notice files.

sources.name: stop-slop
sources.author: Hardik Pandya (hardikpandya)
sources.note: Removes AI writing tells from prose. No bundled ASP rewrite — install by copying the upstream SKILL.md + its references as-is, with the MIT notice.

sources.name: mattpocock/skills
sources.author: Matt Pocock (mattpocock)
sources.note: A collection (~21) of production engineering skills (TDD, architecture review, planning, git guardrails, etc.). Let the user pick which sub-skills to install, or install the set. Copy each chosen skill folder as-is with the MIT notice. The upstream's own 'setup-matt-pocock-skills' skill can drive selection.
